metadata.description: Custom Claude Code dev skills for spec-driven development — high-level scoping, spec writing, architecture, planning, test setup, implementation, verification, plus diagram tooling.

plugins.name: d2-architect
plugins.description: Generate architecture diagrams via a four-phase pipeline — view planning (decide whether the architecture wants a single overview or an overview + zoom-ins), TALA auto-layout for a whiteboard-quality first pass, hand-coded HTML + SVG for…

plugins.name: high-level-scoping
plugins.description: Agile project scoping skill that produces personas, epics, prioritized user stories, a high-level architecture diagram (via the d2-architect skill), and a versioned roadmap starting from a V0 walking skeleton.

plugins.name: html-architect
plugins.description: Generate architecture diagrams as hand-coded HTML + CSS + inline SVG — no D2, no TALA, no auto-layout engine — by applying TALA's software-architecture layout principles manually (symmetry, clusters, hierarchy, balanced ports, hub-centrality, square-ish aspect ratio).

plugins.name: plan-writing
plugins.description: Plans the implementation of a **specific version** (V0, V1, ...) from project-tracking.json, producing a DAG of implementation plans organized into waves — where each wave delivers a vertical, testable, end-to-end slice of the app.

plugins.name: plan-writing-verification
plugins.description: Verifies the output of /plan-writing for a specific version (V0, V1, ...) for completeness, DAG correctness, TDD prescription compliance, and architecture alignment.

plugins.name: repo-initialization
plugins.description: Scaffolds a new project repository from SPECS.md and ARCHITECTURE.md produced by /spec-writing and /research-and-architecture.

plugins.name: repo-initialization-verification
plugins.description: Verifies the output of /repo-initialization for completeness and correctness.

plugins.name: research-and-architecture
plugins.description: Research tech stacks and produce an ARCHITECTURE.md following MIM AA (Module Infrastructure-Module) architecture.

plugins.name: research-and-architecture-verification
plugins.description: Verifies the output of /research-and-architecture for MIM AA compliance, template completeness, and consistency with SPECS.md.

plugins.name: spec-implementation
plugins.description: Autonomous GREEN-phase execution of pre-existing implementation plans for a **specific version** (V0, V1, ...) against pre-written failing tests, Gherkin .feature files, UI wireframes, and ARCHITECTURE.md.

plugins.name: spec-writing
plugins.description: Spec-driven development skill that produces a high-level SPECS.md overview plus executable Cucumber-compatible .feature files (one per feature) with full Gherkin scenarios.

plugins.name: spec-writing-verification
plugins.description: Verifies the output of /spec-writing for completeness, coherence, and template compliance.

plugins.name: test-setup
plugins.description: Writes all BDD step definitions and unit tests for every plan in the DAG for a **specific version** (V0, V1, ...) BEFORE any implementation code exists.

plugins.name: test-setup-verification
plugins.description: Verifies the output of /test-setup for completeness, correctness, and RED-state compliance for a specific version (V0, V1, ...).

plugins.name: ui-specs
plugins.description: Produces a project's design system + UI mockups for a specific version V{N}.

plugins.name: verification-and-validation
plugins.description: Full end-to-end verification of a completed implementation for a **specific version** (V0, V1, ...) against specs, feature files, wireframes, and UI specs.
